components.subtitle: A robust and clear design framework.

selected_component.content:
<button>
    Button
</button>
<style>
/* code - Tags: blue, button, hover */
button {
  padding: 12.5px 30px;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 100px;
  background-color: #2ba8fb;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-weight: Bold;
  transition: all 0.5s;
  -webkit-transition: all 0.5s;
}

button:hover {
  background-color: #6fc5ff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 20px #6fc5ff50;
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

button:active {
  background-color: #3d94cf;
  transition: all 0.25s;
  -webkit-transition: all 0.25s;
  box-shadow: none;
  transform: scale(0.98);
}
</style>
